mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE_CTRL WHERE CFG_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cfgCode}, '%')
SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE_CTRL WHERE CFG_MODEL = #{cfgModel} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE_CTRL A WHERE EXISTS( SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE X WHERE X.EQ_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eqCode}, '%') AND X.DEVICE_TYPE = #{deviceType} AND X.CFG_CODE = A.CFG_CODE ) AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE_CTRL X WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM MD_DEVICE A INNER JOIN MD_EQ B ON A.EQ_CODE = B.EQ_CODE WHERE A.EQ_CODE = #{eqCode} AND X.CFG_CODE = A.CFG_CODE ) AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CFG_CODE
